creator: lambert@lambertfam.org
text:
Still no growth in the Icecast process for us since the initial
increase as more stream sources connected.

Tue Nov 29 13:08:38 $ ps -auwx | grep ice

nobody     57170  0.0  0.2 12760  7088  p0  S+J   8Nov11 268:04.47 /usr/local/bin/icecast -c /usr/local/etc/icecast.xml  -b

-- 
Scott Lambert                    KC5MLE                       Unix SysAdmin
lambert@lambertfam.org
